prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约17596→15769→16071→29726→26492名。2024年出现异常大幅下滑（从16071跌至29726），2025年明显 回升至26492名，近两年波动剧烈，2025年基准位次约26492名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年44人→2022年31人→2023年29人→2024年31人→2025年33人→202 6年33人。2026年计划与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第60名（20 25年第61名），排名稳中有升，属于中上游211院校，综合实力较强；2026年高考周期内上海大学声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假被 免职等）及学校管理事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第48位，评价"较热"，短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可；第五轮 学科评估中，社会学获评A、世界史获评A-，为该校代表性优势学科，与招生专业中的社会学类、文科试验班类等有直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科大类持续高热推荐，与上海大学电子信息类、电气类等招生专业方向契合；山东2026年高考报名总 人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。；上海大学位于上海市，对山 东考生有较强地域吸引力；该校2021年在山东招生44人，占当年全国总招生2769人的约1.6%，山东并非其最主要生源省份，但上海的城市区位优势对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次26492名、2026年招生计划持平、山东省考生总数明显增加（+5.7%）导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面产生轻微降温效应等因素，预计2026年最低录取 位次在2025年基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约26522名，区间26022–27022名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、微电子科学与工程、光电信息科学与工程、人工智能、计算机科学与技术等）
- 电气类（机械设计制造及其自动化、智能制造工程、自动化、机器人工程、电子科学与技术等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班（钱伟长学院）（理论与应用力学、材料设计科学与工程、微电子科学与工程）
- 理科试验班类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、应用物理学）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易、工商管理、会计学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 文科试验班类（哲学、汉语言文学、新闻学、广播电视学、广告学、考古学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约26522名，区间26022–27022名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如26000以内）可重点冲刺电 子信息类、电气类等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（27000左右）建议以三档文科试验班类及二档经济学类为主，谨慎填报一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 17596 → 15769 → 16071 → 29726 → 26492. In 2024, there was an abnormal significant decline (from 16071 to 29726), and in 2025, it rebounded to 26492, with drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 26492. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 44 in 2021 → 31 in 2022 → 29 in 2023 → 31 in 2024 → 33 in 2025 → 33 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 60th (61st in 2025), with a stable and slightly rising ranking, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with relatively strong comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shanghai University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fraud leading to dismissal, etc.) and school management incidents, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 48th, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot', with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, overall attention is acceptable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, sociology was rated A, and world history was rated A-, which are representative advantageous disciplines of the university, directly related to the sociology class and liberal arts experimental class in the enrollment majors, having a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering categories continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Shanghai University's electronic information, electrical and other enrollment major directions. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying overall competition. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates. In 2021, the university enrolled 44 students in Shandong, accounting for about 1.6% of the total national enrollment of 2,769 that year. Shandong is not its main source province, but Shanghai's urban location advantage continues to attract candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 26492, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province (+5.7%) leading to intensified competition, and the slightly negative reputation of the university causing a slight cooling effect, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26522, with a range of 26022–27022.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Electrical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (Qian Weichang College) (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Materials Design Science and Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Applied Physics)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Business Administration, Accounting, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising, Archaeology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 26522, range 26022–27022. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 26000), focus on stretching for popular engineering majors like Electronic Information and Electrical. For rankings near the upper limit (around 27000), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 3 Liberal Arts Experimental Class and Tier 2 Economics, and cautiously fill in Tier 1 popular majors.
